office_address: 1200 Platte River Drive, Suite 105, Denver, CO 80223
emergency_definition: complete loss of water to the house

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_action: take a message and promise a 20-minute callback

non_emergency_routing_rules: Voicemail only. We return all non-emergency calls by 9 AM next business day.

call_transfer_rules.fail_action: take a full message and promise a callback within 2 hours during business hours

integration_constraints: never schedule a drain cleaning job as 'emergency' in ServiceTitan unless personally approved
after_hours_flow_summary: Emergency calls are routed to the on-call line. Non-emergency calls go to voicemail and are returned by 9 AM the next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Answer with 'Thank you for calling Riverside Plumbing and Drain, how can we help you today?' Collect name, number, and basic issue description, then transfer.
special_instructions: always verify if it's residential or commercial before routing
never quote prices on the phone
